{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Karoshan intelligence
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A [[Karoshan]] man was identified as an agent for [[Karoshan intelligence]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“He’s an agent for Karoshan intelligence,” I said.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
